acceptance.curve_gate: the first registered post-baseline eight-seed mean is strictly above the registered baseline mean, and each of the next two registered means is greater than or equal to its predecessor

analysis.primary_estimand: paired difference-in-differences: (profanity-treatment minus base) minus (signflip-control minus base), matched by seed and sealed item
analysis.secondary_estimand: paired profanity-treatment minus base across seeds and items
analysis.seed_sign_test: exact two-sided sign test across eight registered seeds

conditional_launch_predicate.authorization: the closeout is intentionally unavailable at V7 freeze; prepare and every launch verification require later committed bytes and record their SHA-256
conditional_launch_predicate.cancellation_rule: missing or ineligible V6 closeout, any unlock/collection/evaluation, or any uncertainty about sealed-final exposure permanently cancels V7
conditional_launch_predicate.source_evidence_policy: the closeout must name each exact committed evidence path and SHA-256; the validator recomputes every digest and rejects any final/eval/analysis artifact

curve_gate.criterion: the first registered post-baseline eight-seed mean is strictly above the registered baseline mean, and each of the next two registered means is greater than or equal to its predecessor

execution.backend_fallback_policy: this registration permits one whole attempt on Modal L40S with online W&B only; never mix hardware or tracking modes within an attempt; an RTX4090/offline-W&B fallback requires a separate registration made either before any Modal outcome or after immutable closeout of a partial Modal attempt, plus fresh state/claim, preserved offline W&B directories, and the same frozen IDs and scientific inputs
execution.gpu_app_overlap_policy: no other Modal GPU app may overlap this V7 attempt

gpu_lease.policy: every GPU entrypoint atomically claims the named Dict key with a fresh nonce, fails closed if occupied or ambiguous, releases only its own nonce after durable publication, never steals by timeout, and permits only root-authorized forensic recovery after immutable closeout

execution.infrastructure_retry_policy: a completed run may only retry publication of its immutable terminal W&B artifact; never overwrite or resume model optimization; any partial nonterminal run closes the whole attempt immutably and requires a fresh registered claim/volume

matched_control: negate every selected treatment score-component weight and change nothing else except condition identity

operator_knowledge_boundary.claim_boundary: V7 prospectively replicates its curve across new seeds on exposed development data and reserves inference for the conditionally untouched 900-item final
operator_knowledge_boundary.independence_scope: the exact profanity recipe, 0/4/10/20 nodes, seeds, controls, and W&B identities were frozen without inspecting any additional V6 outcome
operator_knowledge_boundary.root_operator: root may have access to ongoing V6 progress; V6 outcomes cannot alter this frozen V7 design
operator_knowledge_boundary.selection_agent: the V7 implementer used only committed completed exploratory artifacts and did not inspect any additional V6 or sealed-final outcome

outcome_status_at_freeze: conditional V7 frozen while V6 remained nonterminal; the V7 implementer inspected no additional V6 or sealed-final outcome and no V7 outcome exists

curve.role: retired and exposed development curve; never a significance set

source_parent.role: V6 sealed final, reusable only after the predicate proves it was never opened
